jobs.title: Factory Digitalization and Automation Engineer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Switzerland as a Digitalization & Automation Engineer and support our factory's digital transformation by designing, developing, and implementing automation, digitalization, and data-driven improvement solutions. How you'll make an impact Analyze manufacturing and business processes to identify automation and digitalization opportunities Design and implement solutions for process automation (industrial or office), digital workflows and paperless processes, as well as production data collection and analysis Collaborate with Operations, IT, Quality, and Continuous Improvement teams to define functional and technical requirements Develop and maintain KPI dashboards (OEE, productivity, quality, downtime) and data acquisition systems (PLC, sensors, MES) Manage technology suppliers and system integrators Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and cybersecurity standards Train end users and support change management activities Your background Master's or bachelor's degree in engineering (Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Electronics, or similar) Solid understanding of control logic and process automation, operational process digitalization Experience with MES, ERP, or traceability systems Knowledge of Python, SQL, Power BI \/ Tableau, RPA tools (for example: Power Automate) and industrial IoT solutions Experience with data analysis and reporting tools Experience in manufacturing or industrial environments Technical English (written and spoken) and Italian at least intermediate Familiarity of Lean Six Sigma methodologies and industrial automation systems (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) is an advantage More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team di Molinazzo di Monteggio, Svizzera come ingegnere di digitalizzazione e automazione e supporta la trasformazione digitale della nostra fabbrica progettando, sviluppando e implementando soluzioni di automazione, digitalizzazione e miglioramento basate sui dati. ## Mansioni - Analizzare processi produttivi e aziendali per identificare opportunità di automazione e digitalizzazione - Progettazione e realizzazione di soluzioni per l'automazione dei processi (industriale o ufficio), flussi di lavoro digitali e processi senza carta, nonché raccolta e analisi dei dati di produzione - Collaborare con i team Operazioni, IT, Qualità e Miglioramento continuo per definire requisiti funzionali e tecnici - Sviluppare e mantenere cruscotti KPI (OEE, produttività, qualità, downtime) e sistemi di acquisizione dati (PLC, sensori, MES) - Gestione di fornitori di tecnologia e integratori di sistema - Garantire il rispetto degli standard di sicurezza, qualità e sicurezza informatica - Utenti finali e attività di gestione dei cambiamenti di supporto # Requisiti # - Master o laurea in ingegneria (Automazione, Meccatronica, Informatica, Elettronica, o simili) - Solida comprensione della logica di controllo e dell'automazione dei processi, digitalizzazione dei processi operativi - Esperienza con sistemi MES, ERP o tracciabilità - Conoscenza di Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, strumenti RPA (ad esempio: Power Automate) e soluzioni IoT industriali - Esperienza con l'analisi dei dati e strumenti di reportistica - Esperienza in ambienti industriali o industriali - Inglese tecnico (scritto e parlato) e italiano almeno intermedio - La familiarità delle metodologie Lean Six Sigma e dei sistemi di automazione industriale (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) è un vantaggio # Cosa # Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity Join our team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Switzerland as a Digitalization & Automation Engineer and support our factory's digital transformation by designing, developing, and implementing automation, digitalization, and data-driven improvement solutions. ## Mansioni - Analyze manufacturing and business processes to identify automation and digitalization opportunities - Design and implement solutions for process automation (industrial or office), digital workflows and paperless processes, as well as production data collection and analysis - Collaborate with Operations, IT, Quality, and Continuous Improvement teams to define functional and technical requirements - Develop and maintain KPI dashboards (OEE, productivity, quality, downtime) and data acquisition systems (PLC, sensors, MES) - Manage technology suppliers and system integrators - Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and cybersecurity standards - Train end users and support change management activities ## Requisiti - Master's or bachelor's degree in engineering (Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Electronics, or similar) - Solid understanding of control logic and process automation, operational process digitalization - Experience with MES, ERP, or traceability systems - Knowledge of Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, RPA tools (for example: Power Automate) and industrial IoT solutions - Experience with data analysis and reporting tools - Experience in manufacturing or industrial environments - Technical English (written and spoken) and Italian at least intermediate - Familiarity of Lean Six Sigma methodologies and industrial automation systems (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) is an advantage ## Cosa offriamo - More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Descrizione Die Chance: Treten Sie unserem Team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Schweiz, als Digitalisierungs- und Automatisierungsingenieur bei und unterstützen Sie die digitale Transformation unserer Fabrik, indem Sie Automatisierungs-, Digitalisierungs- und datengetriebene Verbesserungslösungen entwerfen, entwickeln und implementieren. ## Mansioni – Analyse von Fertigungs- und Geschäftsprozessen, um Automatisierungs- und Digitalisierungsmöglichkeiten zu identifizieren – Lösungen für Prozessautomatisierung (Industrie- oder Büroentwicklung), digitale Arbeitsabläufe und papierlose Prozesse sowie für die Sammlung und Analyse von Produktionsdaten zu entwerfen und umzusetzen – Zusammenarbeit mit Teams für Betrieb, IT, Qualität und kontinuierliche Verbesserung, um funktionale und technische Anforderungen zu definieren – Entwicklung und Pflege von KPI-Dashboards (OEE, Produktivität, Qualität, Ausfallzeit) und Datenerfassungssysteme (SPS, Sensoren, MES) - Verwaltung von Technologiezulieferern und Systemintegratoren - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Sicherheits-, Qualitäts- und Cybersicherheitsstandards - Ausbildung von Endnutzern und Unterstützung von Change-Management-Aktivitäten ## Requisiti - Master- oder Bachelorabschluss in Ingenieurwesen (Automatisierung, Mechatronik, Informatik, Elektronik oder Ähnliches) - Solides Verständnis von Regelungslogik und Prozessautomatisierung, operativer Prozessdigitalisierung - Erfahrung mit MES-, ERP- oder Rückverfolgungssystemen – Kenntnisse in Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, RPA-Tools (z. B. Power Automate) und industriellen IoT-Lösungen – Erfahrung mit Datenanalyse- und Berichtswerkzeugen – Erfahrung in Fertigungs- oder Industrieumgebungen – Technisches Englisch (geschrieben und gesprochen) und Italienisch mindestens auf Mittelstufe – Vertrautheit mit Lean Six Sigma-Methoden und industriellen Automatisierungssystemen (SPS, HMI, SCADA, IBA) ist ein Vorteil ## Cosa offriamo – Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen, persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und gleichzeitig ein Umfeld zu schaffen, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opportunité Rejoignez notre équipe à Molinazzo di Monteggio, Suisse en tant qu'ingénieur Digitalisation & Automation et soutenez la transformation numérique de notre usine en concevant, développant et implémentant des solutions d'automatisation, de numérisation et d'amélioration des données. Les hommes - Analyser les processus de fabrication et d'affaires pour identifier les possibilités d'automatisation et de numérisation - Concevoir et mettre en œuvre des solutions pour l'automatisation des processus (industriels ou de bureau), les flux de travail numériques et les processus sans papier, ainsi que la collecte et l'analyse des données de production - Collaborer avec les équipes Opérations, TI, Qualité et Amélioration continue pour définir les exigences fonctionnelles et techniques - Développer et entretenir des tableaux de bord KPI (EEE, productivité, qualité, temps d'arrêt) et des systèmes d'acquisition de données (PLC, capteurs, MES) - Gérer les fournisseurs de technologie et les intégrateurs de systèmes - Assurer le respect des normes de sécurité, de qualité et de cybersécurité - Former les utilisateurs finaux et soutenir les activités de gestion du changement ## Requisiti - Maîtrise ou baccalauréat en ingénierie (Automation, Mécatronique, Informatique, Électronique ou similaire) - Compréhension solide de la logique de contrôle et de l'automatisation des processus, numérisation des processus opérationnels - Expérience des systèmes MES, ERP ou de traçabilité - Connaissance de Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, outils RPA (par exemple: Power Automate) et solutions IoT industrielles - Expérience des outils d ' analyse et de communication des données - Expérience dans les environnements industriels ou manufacturiers - Anglais technique (écrit et parlé) et italien au moins intermédiaire - Connaissance des méthodologies Lean Six Sigma et des systèmes d'automatisation industrielle (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) est un avantage Cosa offriamo - Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Technical Project Manager 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. How you'll make an impact Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs Identifying\/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables Your background Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure Team-player able to build and motivate a project team More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Siamo alla ricerca di un Project Manager per rafforzare il nostro Team nel nostro Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In questo ruolo si sta conducendo l'esecuzione di progetti di medie dimensioni principalmente relativi a trasformatori e reattori LV & MV e garantire che tutte le attività correlate siano svolte in conformità con la politica di Hitachi Energy, standard di qualità, requisiti di salute e sicurezza e ambiente. Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere. Invia il tuo curriculum in inglese. ## Mansioni - Sviluppare programmi di progetto e determinare i requisiti delle risorse - Monitoraggio e reporting sullo stato dei progetti tra cui costi, tempi e personale - Garantire l'aderenza agli standard di qualità interni ed esterni (ad esempio, International Standards Organization) - Gestire i progetti After-Sales assicurando il soddisfacimento delle esigenze del cliente - Identificare/risolvere ostacoli al completamento del progetto sul tempo e sul budget - maggio includono la gestione di progetti di trasformazione aziendale multipli e intercorrelati Su alcuni progetti, il lavoro può includere l'integrazione dei compiti del fornitore nel piano di progetto e il monitoraggio e la revisione dei fornitori consegnabili ## Requisiti - Ingegneria elettrica o ingegneria meccanica Background - 2-3 anni comprovata esperienza in Project Management con focus su Transformers e Reactors - Collaborazione con il diverso numero di stakeholder - Molto buona conoscenza dell'inglese e dell'italiano; qualsiasi altra lingua è un plus - Forte comunicatore, auto-driven e open-minded - Strutturato e organizzato a persona ## Contatto Invia il tuo curriculum in inglese.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. ## Mansioni - Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements - Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing - Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) - Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs - Identifying/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget - May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) - On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables ## Requisiti - Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background - 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors - Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders - Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus - Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded - Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure - Team-player able to build and motivate a project team ## Cosa offriamo - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. ## Contatto Please submit your resume in English.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Wir suchen einen Projektmanager, um unser Team in unserem Business Unit Transformers, Ticino, zu stärken. In dieser Rolle führen Sie die Durchführung von mittelständischen Projekten vor allem im Zusammenhang mit LV & MV Transformers und Reactors und stellen sicher, dass alle damit verbundenen Aktivitäten in Übereinstimmung mit Hitachi Energiepolitik, Qualitätsstandards, Gesundheit und Sicherheit und Umweltanforderungen durchgeführt werden. Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können. Bitte geben Sie Ihren Lebenslauf auf Englisch ein. Mansioni - Entwicklung von Projektplänen und Bestimmung von Ressourcenanforderungen - Überwachung und Berichterstattung über den Status von Projekten einschließlich Kosten, Zeit und Personal - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung interner und externer Qualitätsstandards (z.B. International Standards Organization) - Verwalten von After-Sales-Projekten durch die Sicherstellung der Erfüllung von Kundenbedürfnissen - Identifikation/Resolvieren von Hindernissen für das Projekt zur Zeit und zum Budget - Mai umfassen die Arbeit mit mehreren geschäftsbezogenen Projekten Bei einigen Projekten kann die Arbeit die Integration von Lieferantenaufgaben in den Projektplan und das Tracking und die Überprüfung von Lieferanten liefern. Requisiti - Elektrotechnik oder Maschinenbau Hintergrund - 2-3 Jahre bewährte Erfahrung im Projektmanagement mit Fokus auf Transformers und Reactors - Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Interessengruppen - Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Englisch und Italienisch wachsen; alle anderen Sprachen sind ein Plus - Starker Kommunikationspartner, selbstfahrende und offen-gesinnte Mitarbeiter Â Contatto Bitte geben Sie Ihren Lebenslauf auf Englisch ein.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Nous sommes à la recherche d'un gestionnaire de projet pour renforcer notre équipe dans notre unité de transformation, Tessin. Dans ce rôle, vous dirigez l'exécution de projets de taille moyenne principalement liés à LV & MV Transformateurs et Réacteurs et vous assurez que toutes les activités connexes sont réalisées conformément à la politique Hitachi Energy, aux normes de qualité, à la santé et à la sécurité et aux exigences environnementales. Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir. Veuillez soumettre votre curriculum vitae en anglais. ## Mansioni - Élaborer des calendriers de projets et déterminer les besoins en ressources - Suivi et établissement de rapports sur l'état d'avancement des projets, y compris les coûts, le calendrier et la dotation - Assurer le respect des normes de qualité internes et externes (p. ex., l'Organisation internationale de normalisation) - Gérer les projets après-vente en assurant la satisfaction des besoins des clients - Identifier et résoudre les obstacles à l'achèvement du projet dans les délais et le budget - Peut comprendre la gestion de projets multiples et interdépendants (y compris les projets de transformation des activités) - Sur certains projets, le travail peut inclure l'intégration des tâches des fournisseurs dans le plan du projet et le suivi et l'examen des produits livrables des fournisseurs ## Requisiti - Génie électrique ou génie mécanique Contexte - 2-3 ans d'expérience prouvée en gestion de projet avec l'accent sur les transformateurs et les réacteurs - Collaboration avec divers intervenants - Très bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'italien; toute autre langue est un plus - Communicateur fort, autonome et ouvert - Personne structurée et organisée ayant la capacité de travailler sous pression temporelle - Joueur d'équipe capable de construire et de motiver une équipe de projet ## Cosa offriamo - Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir. ## Contatto Veuillez soumettre votre CV en anglais.

jobs.title: Electrical Engineer – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our team to drive the implementation of the latest internal and external standards in our Dry Transformers across all the factories in HUB Europe. This role offers you an exciting opportunity to broaden your expertise across various disciplines and functions, engage in dynamic projects and build a strong professional network both within and outside our organization. How you'll make an impact Be an active member of International Standards Committees, staying up to date with emerging changes and requirements and influencing standards development Support Product Management in developing and implementing our Global Technology Platform by engaging in requirements definition and supporting the rollout phases Work with teams from various functions, including Engineering, Operations and Quality. You will establish and maintain both internal and external networks to facilitate information exchange Oversee operations across multiple factories and work towards operational harmonization Ensure the effective implementation of both internal and external standards within our Power Transformers Units in Europe by conducting audits, identifying gaps and facilitating their resolution Responsible for communicating updates, deliver training sessions and provide support and technical guidance to colleagues on Standards Compliance related questions Represent our Company in standards-related discussions with customers and industry stakeholders Your background Master's degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical are preferred) About 10 to 15 years of experience in the Power Transformer field Experience in Project Management and managing functional teams Deep knowledge of transformers design, manufacturing, testing and operations Interest in AI tools and their potential integration into one's work L6S green belt is preferred Excellent intercultural sensitivity and ability to develop and maintain healthy working relationships Strong communication skills, fluent in English, both written and spoken More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Ingegnere elettrico – Standard Compliance Expert per trasformatori a secco 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.en: Electrical Engineer – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.de: Electrical Ingenieur – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Ingénieur électrique – Expert en conformité avec les normes pour les transformateurs à sec 80 – 100% (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team per guidare l'implementazione degli ultimi standard interni ed esterni nei nostri Dry Transformers in tutte le fabbriche di HUB Europe. Questo ruolo vi offre un'opportunità emozionante per ampliare le vostre competenze in diverse discipline e funzioni, impegnarsi in progetti dinamici e costruire una forte rete professionale sia all'interno che all'esterno della nostra organizzazione. ## Mansioni Come farete un impatto - Essere un membro attivo di International Standards Committees, rimanere aggiornati con cambiamenti e requisiti emergenti e influenzare lo sviluppo degli standard - Supporto Product Management nello sviluppo e nell'attuazione della nostra Global Technology Platform, impegnando nella definizione dei requisiti e sostenendo le fasi di rollout - Lavorare con team di varie funzioni, tra cui Ingegneria, Operazioni e Qualità. - No. Istituire e mantenere sia le reti interne che esterne per facilitare lo scambio di informazioni - Superare le operazioni tra più fabbriche e lavorare verso l'armonizzazione operativa - Assicurare l'effettiva implementazione di standard interni ed esterni all'interno delle nostre Power Transformers Units in Europe conducendo audit, identificando le lacune e facilitando la loro risoluzione - Responsabile per la comunicazione di aggiornamenti, fornire sessioni di formazione eccellenti e fornire assistenza tecnica ai colleghi di standard.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity Join our team to drive the implementation of the latest internal and external standards in our Dry Transformers across all the factories in HUB Europe. This role offers you an exciting opportunity to broaden your expertise across various disciplines and functions, engage in dynamic projects and build a strong professional network both within and outside our organization. ## Mansioni How you'll make an impact - Be an active member of International Standards Committees, staying up to date with emerging changes and requirements and influencing standards development - Support Product Management in developing and implementing our Global Technology Platform by engaging in requirements definition and supporting the rollout phases - Work with teams from various functions, including Engineering, Operations and Quality. - You will establish and maintain both internal and external networks to facilitate information exchange - Oversee operations across multiple factories and work towards operational harmonization - Ensure the effective implementation of both internal and external standards within our Power Transformers Units in Europe by conducting audits, identifying gaps and facilitating their resolution - Responsible for communicating updates, deliver training sessions and provide support and technical guidance to colleagues on Standards Compliance related questions - Represent our Company in standards-related discussions with customers and industry stakeholders ## Requisiti Your background - Master's degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical are preferred) - About 10 to 15 years of experience in the Power Transformer field - Experience in Project Management and managing functional teams - Deep knowledge of transformers design, manufacturing, testing and operations - Interest in AI tools and their potential integration into one's work - L6S green belt is preferred - Excellent intercultural sensitivity and ability to develop and maintain healthy working relationships - Strong communication skills, fluent in English, both written and spoken ## About us - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Nehmen Sie an unserem Team teil, um die Umsetzung der neuesten internen und externen Standards in unseren Dry Transformers in allen Fabriken in HUB Europe voranzutreiben. Diese Rolle bietet Ihnen eine spannende Gelegenheit, Ihr Know-how über verschiedene Disziplinen und Funktionen zu erweitern, dynamische Projekte zu engagieren und ein starkes professionelles Netzwerk sowohl innerhalb als auch außerhalb unserer Organisation aufzubauen. In den Warenkorb Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben - Seien Sie aktives Mitglied der International Standards Committees, bleiben Sie auf dem neuesten Stand mit neuen Änderungen und Anforderungen und beeinflussen Standards Entwicklung - Support Product Management bei der Entwicklung und Umsetzung unserer Global Technology Platform durch die Einbeziehung von Anforderungen Definition und Unterstützung der Rollout Phasen - Arbeiten Sie mit Teams aus verschiedenen Funktionen, einschließlich Engineering, Operations und Qualität. - Ja. Sie werden interne und externe Netzwerke einrichten und pflegen, um den Informationsaustausch zu erleichtern - Operationen in mehreren Fabriken zu überwachen und zur operativen Harmonisierung zu arbeiten - Sicherstellung der effektiven Umsetzung von internen und externen Standards in unseren Power Transformers Units in Europa durch Audits, Identifizierung von Lücken und Erleichterung ihrer Auflösung - verantwortlich für die Kommunikation von Updates, Bereitstellung von Schulungen und technische Anleitungen für Kollegen zu Standards Compliance-bezogene Fragen - Repräsentieren Sie unser Unternehmen in standardsbezogenen Diskussionen mit Kunden.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opportunité Rejoignez notre équipe pour conduire la mise en œuvre des dernières normes internes et externes dans nos transformateurs à sec dans toutes les usines de HUB Europe. Ce rôle vous offre une occasion passionnante d'élargir votre expertise dans diverses disciplines et fonctions, de participer à des projets dynamiques et de bâtir un solide réseau professionnel au sein et à l'extérieur de notre organisation. Les hommes Comment vous allez avoir un impact - Soyez un membre actif des Comités internationaux de normalisation, restez informé des nouveaux changements et exigences et influencez l'élaboration de normes - Supportez la gestion des produits dans le développement et la mise en oeuvre de notre plateforme technologique mondiale en participant à la définition des exigences et en soutenant les phases de déploiement - Travaillez avec des équipes de différentes fonctions, y compris l'ingénierie, les opérations et la qualité. - Oui. Vous établirez et entretenirez des réseaux internes et externes pour faciliter l'échange d'information - Superviser les opérations dans plusieurs usines et travailler à l'harmonisation opérationnelle - Assurer la mise en oeuvre efficace des normes internes et externes au sein de nos unités de transformateurs de puissance en Europe en procédant à des audits, en identifiant les lacunes et en facilitant leur résolution - Responsable de la communication des mises à jour, de la prestation de séances de formation et de l'orientation technique aux collègues sur les questions liées à la conformité - Représenter notre société dans les discussions liées aux normes avec les clients et les intervenants de l'industrie ## Requisi Votre expérience - Maîtrise en génie (on préfère la maîtrise en électronique ou en mécanique) - Environ 10 à 15 ans d'expérience dans le domaine de la transformation de puissance - Expérience en gestion de projet et en gestion d'équipes fonctionnelles - Connaissance approfondie de la conception, de la fabrication, des essais et des opérations des transformateurs - Intérêt pour les outils d'IA et leur intégration potentielle dans son travail - La ceinture verte L6S est préférée - Excellente sensibilité interculturelle et capacité de développer et de maintenir des relations de travail saines - Fortes compétences en communication, couramment en anglais, à la fois écrite.

jobs.title: Electrical Design Engineer - Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. How you'll make an impact Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency Your background Degree in electrical engineering or a related field 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team English is a must, Italian is beneficial Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement. More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Ingegnere di progettazione elettrica - Trasformatori a secco 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Ingénieur de conception électrique - Transformateurs à sec 80 – 100% (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team di ingegneria Dry Transformer, ti aiuterà a modellare i progetti di nuova generazione che migliorano la sicurezza, l'efficienza e la sostenibilità nelle applicazioni di potenza critica. Collaborerai a stretto contatto con R&D, produzione, qualità e supply chain per tradurre i requisiti dei clienti in soluzioni manifatturiere e vederli attraverso prototipi, test di tipo e rilascio seriale. Lavorando in progetti e standard globali, approfondirete le vostre competenze nei sistemi di isolamento, nella progettazione elettromagnetica e nelle prestazioni termiche, contribuendo alla digitalizzazione dei nostri processi di progettazione. Questo è un ruolo di alto impatto in cui il vostro lavoro consente direttamente elettricità affidabile per industrie e comunità in tutto il mondo. ## Mansioni - Produrre lo sviluppo di specifiche e modelli di progettazione, assicurarsi che soddisfino tutti gli standard e le normative pertinenti - Condurre approfondite recensioni di progettazione e verifiche, implementare modifiche per elevare la qualità del progetto - Monitorare e gestire le timeline di progetto, garantire la realizzazione di pietre miliari e progetti sono forniti su pianificazione - Condurre valutazioni del rischio, sviluppare strategie di mitigazione, e cercare opportunità di progettazione
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. ## Mansioni - Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations - Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality - Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule - Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations - Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction - Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components - Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing - Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency ## Requisiti - Degree in electrical engineering or a related field - 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers - Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills - Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team - English is a must, Italian is beneficial - Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership - Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement ## Cosa offriamo - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Mit unserem Dry Transformer Engineering Team können Sie Designs der nächsten Generation gestalten, die Sicherheit, Effizienz und Nachhaltigkeit in kritischen Leistungsanwendungen verbessern. Sie arbeiten eng mit F&D, Produktion, Qualität und Lieferkette zusammen, um die Kundenanforderungen in manufakturierbare Lösungen zu übersetzen und durch Prototypen, Mustertests und Serienfreigabe zu sehen. In der Zusammenarbeit mit globalen Projekten und Standards vertiefen Sie Ihr Know-how in Isolationssystemen, elektromagnetischem Design und thermischer Leistung und tragen zur Digitalisierung unserer Designprozesse bei. Dies ist eine wichtige Rolle, in der Ihre Arbeit direkt zuverlässigen Strom für Industrien und Gemeinden weltweit ermöglicht. Unsere Mansioni - Führen Sie die Entwicklung von Design-Spezifikationen und -Modellen, um sicherzustellen, dass sie alle relevanten Standards und Vorschriften erfüllen - Durchführung gründlicher Design-Bewertungen und -Verifikationen, Umsetzung von Änderungen der Projektqualität - Überwachung und Verwaltung von Projekt-Zeitplänen, Gewährleistung von Design-Migrationen und Projekte auf Zeitplan - Führen Sie Risikobewertungen, entwickeln Sie Minderungsstrategien und suchen Sie Möglichkeiten für Design-Innovationen
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'occasion De vous joindre à notre équipe d'ingénierie de Transformateur Dry, vous aiderez à façonner des conceptions de prochaine génération qui améliorent la sécurité, l'efficacité et la durabilité dans les applications énergétiques critiques. Vous collaborerez étroitement avec la R-D, la production, la qualité et la chaîne d'approvisionnement afin de traduire les exigences des clients en solutions de fabrication et de les voir par prototype, essai de type et libération en série. En travaillant sur des projets et des normes mondiaux, vous approfondirez votre expertise en systèmes d'isolation, conception électromagnétique et performance thermique tout en contribuant à la numérisation de nos processus de conception. Il s'agit d'un rôle à fort impact où votre travail permet directement une électricité fiable pour les industries et les collectivités du monde entier. ## Mansioni - Diriger l'élaboration de spécifications et de modèles de conception, s'assurer qu'ils répondent à toutes les normes et réglementations pertinentes - Effectuer des examens et des vérifications approfondis de la conception, mettre en oeuvre des modifications pour améliorer la qualité du projet - Surveiller et gérer les échéances du projet, s'assurer que les étapes de la conception sont franchies et que les projets sont exécutés selon le calendrier prévu - Effectuer des évaluations des risques, élaborer des stratégies d'atténuation et rechercher des occasions d'innovation en matière de conception - Faire participer les clients à la prise en compte et à l'intégration de leurs commentaires dans les solutions de conception, améliorer la satisfaction des clients - Collaborer avec l'équipe de la chaîne d'approvisionnement pour s'assurer que les conceptions sont manufacturables et rentables, choisir des matériaux et des composants optimaux - Préparer et tenir à jour une documentation détaillée qui appuie les processus de conception et facilite le partage des connaissances - Identifier et mettre en oeuvre des améliorations continues de la conception fondées sur les résultats des essais et les meilleures pratiques de l'industrie, améliorer la qualité et l'efficacité ## Requisiti - Degré d'ingénierie électrique ou

jobs.title: Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Factory Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist part of the local HSE team, you will play a key role in participating to HSE development, with main focus on Environmental topic, but granting a good support on Health & Safety activities. Key tasks on the Environmental side will be related to safeguarding our site's environmental integrity and driving our sustainability ambitions forward. In this role, you will ensure full compliance with all relevant environmental laws, regulations, and permits, while fostering strong relationships with community stakeholders and environmental authorities. You will develop, implement, and maintain robust environmental policies and procedures that promote accountability across the organization. By conducting environmental risk assessments, delivering training on sustainability practices, and leading initiatives that improve resource efficiency, you will directly contribute to reducing the factory's environmental footprint and supporting long-term operational excellence. On the H&S part, you'll be required to support main Health and Safety development activities organized by the HSE Manager, delivering results according to Management expectations. Please submit your application in English. How you'll make an impact Ensure regulatory compliance with Swiss environmental law and related frameworks (USG\/EPA, LRV\/OAPC, GSchG\/WPA, VVEA, ChemA\/ChemO), including permit management and coordination with cantonal authorities (BAFU) Lead environmental impact assessments for new production lines, plant changes, and modifications, ensuring alignment with internal environmental policies Manage waste and disposals, including segregation, traceability, registers, supplier audits, and all special waste streams, while supporting wastereduction and VVEA improvement initiatives Oversee chemical compliance, including ChemA, ChemO, ORRChem, CLP, Manage and maintain Safety SDS requirements, and notifications of new substances Support safe handling and storage of dangerous goods (DG) by coordinating with relevant departments and ensuring ongoing compliance Plan and conduct environmental audits and inspections, identifying improvement areas and ensuring timely corrective actions, also providing environmental compliance support and training to Engineering, Maintenance, and overall Business Unit, including REACH\/RoHS documentation and sustainability-related data needs On the Health and Safety part, you're required to support HSE manager in H&S-related topics managing production activities and equipment with the highest safety standards, both on the practical part and on documentation preparation. Support HSE reporting activities required by governmental or Hitachi Energy internal stakeholders. Your background Min. 3 years of experience in environmental roles within the industrial sector and strong knowledge of Swiss environmental regulations and compliance obligations Solid understanding of best practices in emissions, waste, water, chemicals, and sustainability Strong analytical skills, including environmental data processing and use of relevant software tools Basic knowledge of H&S principles and concepts Excellent command of Office 365 applications Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to assess environmental risks and develop effective mitigation strategies Excellent verbal and written communication skills for engaging with diverse internal and external stakeholders Fluent in Italian and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialista 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.en: Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.de: Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Spezialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Spécialiste 80 – 100% (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione L'opportunità Come Factory Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist parte del team HSE locale, si svolgerà un ruolo chiave nella partecipazione allo sviluppo HSE, con l'obiettivo principale sul tema ambientale, ma garantendo un buon supporto alle attività di salute e sicurezza. I compiti chiave sul lato ambientale saranno legati alla salvaguardia dell'integrità ambientale del nostro sito e alla promozione delle nostre ambizioni di sostenibilità. In questo ruolo, si assicurerà il pieno rispetto di tutte le pertinenti leggi ambientali, regolamenti e permessi, mentre promuovendo forti relazioni con le parti interessate della comunità e le autorità ambientali. Si svilupperà, implementerà e manterrà robuste politiche e procedure ambientali che promuovono la responsabilità in tutta l'organizzazione. Condurre valutazioni dei rischi ambientali, fornire formazione sulle pratiche di sostenibilità e le principali iniziative che migliorano l'efficienza delle risorse, contribuirà direttamente a ridurre l'impronta ambientale della fabbrica e sostenere l'eccellenza operativa a lungo termine. Nella parte H&S, sarai tenuto a sostenere le principali attività di sviluppo della salute e della sicurezza organizzate dal HSE Manager, offrendo risultati secondo le aspettative della Direzione. Invia la tua richiesta in inglese. # Gestione dei dati ambientali, gestione dei rifiuti, gestione dei rifiuti, gestione dei rifiuti, gestione dei sistemi di controllo ambientale, gestione dei rifiuti, gestione dei rifiuti Per quanto riguarda la salute e la sicurezza, siete tenuti a sostenere il manager HSE nei temi relativi alla gestione delle attività di produzione e delle attrezzature con i più elevati standard di sicurezza, sia nella parte pratica che nella preparazione della documentazione - Supporta le attività di reportistica HSE richieste dai soggetti interessati interni di gestione o Hitachi Energy # Il vostro background - Min. 3 anni di esperienza in ruoli ambientali eccellenti nel settore industriale e una forte conoscenza delle normative ambientali svizzere e degli obblighi di conformità - Solida comprensione delle migliori pratiche in materia di emissioni.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity As a Factory Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist part of the local HSE team, you will play a key role in participating to HSE development, with main focus on Environmental topic, but granting a good support on Health & Safety activities. Key tasks on the Environmental side will be related to safeguarding our site's environmental integrity and driving our sustainability ambitions forward. In this role, you will ensure full compliance with all relevant environmental laws, regulations, and permits, while fostering strong relationships with community stakeholders and environmental authorities. You will develop, implement, and maintain robust environmental policies and procedures that promote accountability across the organization. By conducting environmental risk assessments, delivering training on sustainability practices, and leading initiatives that improve resource efficiency, you will directly contribute to reducing the factory's environmental footprint and supporting long-term operational excellence. On the H&S part, you'll be required to support main Health and Safety development activities organized by the HSE Manager, delivering results according to Management expectations. Please submit your application in English. ## How you'll make an impact - Ensure regulatory compliance with Swiss environmental law and related frameworks (USG/EPA, LRV/OAPC, GSchG/WPA, VVEA, ChemA/ChemO), including permit management and coordination with cantonal authorities (BAFU) - Lead environmental impact assessments for new production lines, plant changes, and modifications, ensuring alignment with internal environmental policies - Manage waste and disposals, including segregation, traceability, registers, supplier audits, and all special waste streams, while supporting waste reduction and VVEA improvement initiatives - Oversee chemical compliance, including ChemA, ChemO, ORRChem, CLP, Manage and maintain Safety SDS requirements, and notifications of new substances - Support safe handling and storage of dangerous goods (DG) by coordinating with relevant departments and ensuring ongoing compliance - Plan and conduct environmental audits and inspections, identifying improvement areas and ensuring timely corrective actions, also providing environmental compliance support and training to Engineering, Maintenance, and overall Business Unit, including REACH/RoHS documentation and sustainability-related data needs - On the Health and Safety part, you're required to support HSE manager in H&S-related topics managing production activities and equipment with the highest safety standards, both on the practical part and on documentation preparation - Support HSE reporting activities required by governmental or Hitachi Energy internal stakeholders ## Your background - Min. 3 years of experience in environmental roles within the industrial sector and strong knowledge of Swiss environmental regulations and compliance obligations - Solid understanding of best practices in emissions, waste, water, chemicals, and sustainability - Strong analytical skills, including environmental data processing and use of relevant software tools - Basic knowledge of H&S principles and concepts - Excellent command of Office 365 applications - Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to assess environmental risks and develop effective mitigation strategies - Excellent verbal and written communication skills for engaging with diverse internal and external stakeholders - Fluent in Italian and English ## More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Die Gelegenheit Als spezialisierter Teil des lokalen HSE-Teams von Factory Environmental and Employe Health & Safety werden Sie eine wichtige Rolle bei der Teilnahme an der HSE-Entwicklung spielen, mit Schwerpunkt auf Umweltthemen, aber eine gute Unterstützung für Gesundheit und Sicherheit. Die wichtigsten Aufgaben auf der Umweltseite werden sich auf die Sicherung der Umweltintegrität unserer Website und die Durchsetzung unserer Nachhaltigkeitsziele beziehen. In dieser Rolle sorgen Sie für die volle Einhaltung aller einschlägigen Umweltgesetze, -vorschriften und -genehmigungen und fördern gleichzeitig starke Beziehungen zu Interessenvertretern und Umweltbehörden der Gemeinschaft. Sie entwickeln, implementieren und pflegen robuste Umweltpolitiken und -verfahren, die die Rechenschaftspflicht im gesamten Unternehmen fördern. Durch Umweltrisikobewertungen, Schulungen zu Nachhaltigkeitspraktiken und führende Initiativen zur Verbesserung der Ressourceneffizienz werden Sie direkt dazu beitragen, den ökologischen Fußabdruck der Fabrik zu reduzieren und langfristige betriebliche Exzellenz zu unterstützen. Zum H&S-Teil werden Sie verpflichtet, die wichtigsten Aktivitäten der Gesundheits- und Sicherheitsentwicklung, die vom HSE-Manager organisiert werden, zu unterstützen und die Ergebnisse nach den Erwartungen der Managements zu liefern. Bitte geben Sie Ihre Bewerbung in Englisch ein. oder Wie Sie Auswirkungen haben - Gewährleistung regulatorischer Einhaltung des schweizerischen Umweltrechts und damit zusammenhängender Rahmen (USG/EPA, LRV/OAPC, GSchG/WPA, VVEA, ChemA/ChemO), einschließlich Genehmigungsmanagement und Koordinierung mit kantonalen Behörden (BAFU) - Führen Sie Umweltverträglichkeitsprüfungen für neue Produktionslinien, Anlagenänderungen und Änderungen, Im Bereich Gesundheit und Sicherheit sind Sie verpflichtet, HSE-Manager in H&S-bezogenen Themen zu unterstützen, die Produktionsaktivitäten und Ausrüstung mit den höchsten Sicherheitsstandards verwalten, sowohl auf dem praktischen Teil als auch auf der Dokumentationsvorbereitung - Unterstützung von HSE-Reporting-Aktivitäten, die von staatlichen oder Hitachi-Energie-internen Interessenvertretern benötigt werden.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opportunité En tant que spécialiste de l'environnement et de la sécurité des employés faisant partie de l'équipe locale de SSE, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la participation au développement de SSE, en mettant l'accent sur le thème environnemental, mais en accordant un bon soutien aux activités de SSE. Les principales tâches du côté environnemental seront liées à la protection de l'intégrité environnementale de notre site et à la promotion de nos ambitions en matière de durabilité. Dans ce rôle, vous assurerez le plein respect de toutes les lois, règlements et permis environnementaux pertinents, tout en favorisant des relations solides avec les intervenants communautaires et les autorités environnementales. Vous allez élaborer, mettre en oeuvre et maintenir des politiques et des procédures environnementales solides qui favorisent la reddition de comptes dans l'ensemble de l'organisation. En procédant à des évaluations des risques environnementaux, en offrant une formation sur les pratiques de durabilité et en dirigeant des initiatives qui améliorent l'efficacité des ressources, vous contribuerez directement à réduire l'empreinte environnementale de l'usine et à soutenir l'excellence opérationnelle à long terme. En ce qui a trait à la santé et à la sécurité, vous devrez appuyer les principales activités de développement de la santé et de la sécurité organisées par le gestionnaire de l'ESH, en donnant des résultats en fonction des attentes de la direction. Veuillez soumettre votre candidature en anglais. - Oui. Comment vous ferez un impact - Assurer le respect réglementaire du droit suisse de l'environnement et des cadres connexes (USG/EPA, LRV/OAPC, GSchG/WPA, VVEA, ChemA/ChemO), y compris la gestion des permis et la coordination avec les autorités cantonales (BAFU) - Diriger les évaluations de l'impact environnemental pour les nouvelles lignes de production, les changements d'usine et les modifications, assurer l'alignement sur les politiques environnementales internes - Gérer les déchets et les éliminations, y compris la ségrégation, la traçabilité, les registres, les audits des fournisseurs et tous les flux spéciaux de déchets, tout en appuyant la réduction des déchets et les initiatives d'amélioration de VVEA - Surveiller la conformité chimique, y compris ChemA, ChemO, ORRChem, CLP, gérer et maintenir les exigences de la SDD en matière de sécurité, et les notifications de nouvelles substances - Soutenir la manutention et le stockage sûrs des marchandises dangereuses (DG) en coordonnant avec les ministères concernés et en assurant la conformité continue - Planifier et effectuer des audits et des inspections environnementaux, identifier les domaines d'amélioration et assurer des mesures correctives Pour ce qui est de la santé et de la sécurité, vous êtes tenu d'appuyer le gestionnaire HSE dans les sujets liés à la H&S qui gèrent les activités de production et l'équipement avec les normes de sécurité les plus élevées, tant sur le plan pratique que sur la préparation de la documentation - Soutenir les activités de rapport HSE requises par les intervenants internes du gouvernement ou de Hitachi Énergie ## Votre expérience - Mini 3 ans d'expérience dans les rôles environnementaux dans le secteur industriel et une solide connaissance de la réglementation environnementale suisse et des obligations en matière de conformité - Bonne compréhension des meilleures pratiques en matière d'émissions, de déchets, d'eau, de produits chimiques et de durabilité - Fortes compétences analytiques, y compris le traitement des données environnementales et l'utilisation des outils logiciels pertinents - Connaissance de base des principes et concepts de H&S - Excellente maîtrise des applications Office 365 - Fortes compétences en résolution de problèmes avec la capacité d'évaluer les risques environnementaux et d'élaborer des stratégies d'atténuation efficaces - Excellentes compétences en communication verbale et écrite pour s'engager auprès de divers intervenants internes et externes - Fluent in Italian and English ## Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à.

jobs.title: Business Analyst Global Product Group DT
jobs.description: The Opportunity: As a part of Global Product Group Distribution & Traction Transformers team, you will be responsible for business analysis for core digitalization projects including Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA and Matterport within 25 factories in the portfolio scope. You will contribute cross-functionally by collaborating with IT function and business domains, as well as being responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining the GPG DT Power BI reports to monitor KPIs and performance metrics How you'll make an impact Ensure adherence to data governance standards and maintain comprehensive documentation for all reports and processes within GPG DT Operations Digital area. Collect and design business requirements into required documentation format and templates. Identify opportunities to enhance reporting processes, tools, and methodologies for greater efficiency and scalability. Implement best practices and leverage emerging technologies to improve data analytics capabilities. Provide training and guidance to business teams on the analytics reports, core digital tools, TrafoSignature tool. Collaborate with global teams, HUBs, and factories to gather requirements and deliver tailored reporting solutions. Act as a key liaison between technical teams and business stakeholders to ensure alignment and transparency. Lead functional and business analysis for core projects: Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA, Matterport from business perspective. Perform user acceptance tests and validation together with key-users and IT. Provide digital updates on GPG DT website content with the usage of CMS. Your background Degree in Engineering, Data Science, IT or a related technical field. Minimum 5 years of experience in end-to-end data analytics, preferably within manufacturing or industrial environments. Proficiency in Power BI, including advanced DAX functions, Power Query, and report scheduling. Good knowledge of data modeling, visualization, and integration from multiple sources (e.g., SAP, SQL, Azure, Power Automate). Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work with global technical teams and stakeholders. Strong understanding of functional and business analysis. Strong problem-solving abilities, attention to detail, and ability to work independently in a global team environment. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully .* * A pplicable only for Poland location align with local law regulations

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione L'opportunità: Come parte del team Global Product Group Distribution & Traction Transformers, sarai responsabile dell'analisi aziendale per i principali progetti di digitalizzazione tra cui Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA e Matterport all'interno di 25 fabbriche nell'ambito del portafoglio. Contribuirai in modo interfunzionale collaborando con la funzione IT e i domini aziendali, oltre ad essere responsabile della progettazione, dello sviluppo e della manutenzione dei report di GPG DT Power BI per monitorare KPI e metriche delle prestazioni ## Mansioni - Garantire l'aderenza agli standard di governance dei dati e mantenere una documentazione completa per tutti i report e i processi all'interno dell'area digitale di GPG DT Operations - Raccogliere e progettare i requisiti aziendali nel formato e nei modelli di documentazione richiesti - Identificare le opportunità per migliorare i processi, gli strumenti e le metodologie di reporting per una maggiore efficienza e scalabilità - Implementare le migliori pratiche e sfruttare le tecnologie emergenti per migliorare le capacità di analisi dei dati - Fornire formazione e orientamento ai team aziendali sui report di analisi, strumenti digitali di base, strumento TrafoSignature - Collaborare con team globali, hub e fabbriche per raccogliere requisiti e fornire soluzioni di reporting personalizzate - Agire come collegamento chiave tra team tecnici e stakeholder aziendali per garantire allineamento e trasparenza - Condurre analisi funzionali e aziendali per i progetti principali: Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA, Matterport dal punto di vista aziendale - Eseguire l'utente

Applicable only for Poland location align with local law regulations
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Die Chance: Als Teil des Teams der Global Product Group Distribution & Traction Transformers sind Sie für die Geschäftsanalyse für zentrale Digitalisierungsprojekte wie Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA und Matterport in 25 Fabriken im Portfoliobereich verantwortlich. Sie leisten einen funktionsübergreifenden Beitrag, indem Sie mit IT-Funktionen und Geschäftsbereichen zusammenarbeiten und für das Entwerfen, Entwickeln und Pflegen der GPG DT Power BI-Berichte verantwortlich sind, um KPIs und Leistungsmetriken zu überwachen ## Mansioni - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Data-Governance-Standards und Pflege einer umfassenden Dokumentation für alle Berichte und Prozesse im digitalen Bereich von GPG DT Operations - Sammeln und Entwerfen von Geschäftsanforderungen in erforderlichen Dokumentationsformaten und -vorlagen - Ermittlung von Möglichkeiten zur Verbesserung von Berichterstattungsprozessen, Tools und Methoden für mehr Effizienz und Skalierbarkeit - Implementierung von Best Practices und Nutzung neuer Technologien zur Verbesserung der Datenanalysefunktionen - Bereitstellung von Schulungen und Anleitungen für Geschäftsteams zu den Analyseberichten, zentralen digitalen Tools, TrafoSignature-Tool - Zusammenarbeit mit globalen Teams, HUBs und Fabriken, um Anforderungen zu erfassen und maßgeschneiderte Berichtslösungen zu liefern - Handeln als wichtige Verbindung zwischen technischen Teams und Geschäftsbeteiligten, um Ausrichtung und Transparenz zu gewährleisten - Leitung von Funktions- und Geschäftsanalysen für Kernprojekte: Digitale TrafoSignatur, ECS, IBA, Matterport aus Geschäftspersicht - Durchführung von Benutzerlösungen
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione The Opportunity: Dans le cadre de l'équipe Global Product Group Distribution & Traction Transformers, vous serez responsable de l'analyse d'affaires pour les projets de numérisation de base, y compris Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA et Matterport dans 25 usines dans le domaine du portefeuille. - Mettre en oeuvre les meilleures pratiques et tirer parti des nouvelles technologies pour améliorer les capacités d'analyse des données - Fournir de la formation et des conseils aux équipes d'affaires sur les rapports analytiques, les outils numériques de base, l'outil TrafoSignature - Collaborer avec les équipes mondiales, les HUB et les usines pour recueillir les exigences et fournir des solutions de rapport adaptées - Agir en tant que liaison clé entre les équipes techniques et les parties prenantes d'affaires pour assurer l'alignement et la transparence - Diriger l'analyse fonctionnelle et opérationnelle pour les projets de base : TrafoSignature numérique, ECS, IBA, Matterport du point de vue des entreprises - Effectuer des essais d'acceptation des utilisateurs et de la validation avec les utilisateurs clés et les TI - Fournir des mises à jour numériques sur le contenu du site Web de GPG DT Nous nous engageons à assurer la pleine transparence et le respect de toutes les exigences légales, en veillant à ce que chaque candidat sache exactement à quoi s'attendre à chaque étape du processus de recrutement - Une fois le processus mené à bien, nous partagerons des informations détaillées sur les conditions financières et les avantages financiers avec le candidat sélectionné - Avant de signer le contrat de travail, vous recevrez tous les détails restants de l'offre, vous donnant le temps et l'espace pour tout examiner soigneusement - Applicable uniquement pour l'emplacement de la Pologne en conformité avec la réglementation locale
